svg.title: stream: true vs stream: false — real world use cases
svg.desc: Side by side comparison of streaming and non-streaming with real life AI application examples at the bottom.
svg.text: Same question · same model · same answer · completely different wire format
① stream: true — tokens arrive as generated
② stream: false — full answer at the end
connection stays open · chunks arrive live
connection closes · one full blob arrives
③ Processing time — from your real output
④ What actually arrived over the wire
⑤ Real world — where each is used
Use streaming when a human is watching
words appear as typed — feels alive
code suggestions appear line by line
